externalRequirements: An evaluator independent of Vanguard implementation
A never-run holdout bundle with frozen source and grader SHA-256 digests
Fresh competitor sessions with pinned CLI versions and identical task/model/budget policy
Provider, model, reasoning effort, tool/step/token budgets, executable/environment digests, and arguments frozen per engine/track
Provider cost assumptions or complete normalized usage for every run
Two independent blinded maintainability reviews per run and evidence-bound third-party adjudication above the disagreement threshold
Signed external container/VM isolation attestation verified against evaluator-owned trust roots
Cluster bootstrap over independent repository groups, never individual repetitions
